name: Premium Wireless Headphones
description: Crystal-clear audio with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery, and premium comfort for all-day listening.

name: Smart Watch Pro X
description: Advanced health tracking, GPS, AMOLED display, and 7-day battery life in a sleek titanium design.

name: True Wireless Earbuds
description: Immersive sound with adaptive ANC, 36-hour total playtime, and IPX5 water resistance for any lifestyle.

name: Mechanical Keyboard TKL
description: Tenkeyless layout with hot-swappable switches, per-key RGB, and aircraft-grade aluminum body.

name: Italian Leather Wallet
description: Slim bifold wallet crafted from full-grain Italian leather. RFID blocking with 8 card slots.

name: Polarized Aviator Sunglasses
description: UV400 polarized lenses in lightweight titanium frames. Reduces glare and eye strain all day long.

name: Barista Pro Coffee Maker
description: 15-bar pressure espresso machine with built-in burr grinder and milk frother. Café quality at home.

name: Nordic Minimalist Desk Lamp
description: Adjustable LED lamp with 5 color temperatures, wireless charging base, and touch dimmer control.

name: Luxury Merino Throw Blanket
description: Ultra-soft 100% Merino wool throw. Naturally temperature-regulating and hypoallergenic.

name: Professional Yoga Mat 6mm
description: Extra-thick non-slip eco-friendly TPE mat with alignment lines and carrying strap included.

name: Insulated Hydro Flask 40oz
description: Triple-wall vacuum insulation keeps drinks cold 24hrs, hot 12hrs. Leak-proof and BPA-free.

name: Atomic Habits – Special Edition
description: James Clear's #1 bestseller on building good habits. Hardcover special edition with exclusive illustrations.
